name: the-cyclevault-social-rules-tests
description: Firestore Security Rules tests for The CycleVault Social.

scripts.test:e2e: npm --prefix ../functions run build && firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,functions "GCLOUD_PROJECT=cyclevault-social node ../functions/scripts/seedCommunities.mjs && vitest run e2e.functions"
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:e2e
